title: Spring Food Market
shortDescription: Local food stalls and tasting experiences.
longDescription:
Enjoy a friendly spring market with local producers.
You can discover small food stands, try seasonal specialties, and buy souvenirs.
Best time to visit: late morning to early afternoon for the most activity.

title: Summer Jazz Night
shortDescription: Evening jazz concert featuring local bands.
longDescription:
A relaxed evening concert with jazz classics and modern local bands.
Recommended for music lovers and tourists who want a cultural night activity.
Arrive a bit early to find seating and enjoy the atmosphere.

title: Autumn Art Exhibition
shortDescription: Seasonal art exhibition with guided tours.
longDescription:
A seasonal exhibition where visitors can explore artworks from local and regional creators.
Ideal for tourists who want an indoor cultural activity.
Guided tours help you understand the story behind selected pieces.

title: Winter Lights Festival
longDescription:
Walk through the Old Town to see light installations, small performances, and seasonal decorations.
A great option for families and visitors during winter evenings.
Wear warm clothes and comfortable shoes for walking.

title: Guided City Walk (Weekly)
shortDescription: Weekly guided walking tour for visitors.
longDescription:
A weekly guided walk that introduces the main historic areas, viewpoints, and stories of Luxembourg City.
Good for first-time visitors who want an easy overview.
Bring a small water bottle and be ready for stairs in some parts of the route.

title: Family Outdoor Cinema
shortDescription: Outdoor movie screenings across three evenings.
longDescription:
Three evenings of outdoor movies in a park setting.
Great for families and groups of friends during summer.
Bring a light jacket for later hours and arrive early for a good spot.

title: Wine Tasting Weekend
shortDescription: Regional wines and local food pairings.
longDescription:
A weekend event where visitors can taste wines and learn about local producers.
Recommended for adults and tourists who want a calm cultural experience.
Consider using public transport if you plan to taste multiple wines.

title: Tech Meetup: Travel Apps
shortDescription: Talks and networking for travel-tech enthusiasts.
longDescription:
Short talks about travel technology and building useful travel apps.
Good for students, developers, and entrepreneurs.
Stay for networking if you want to meet people working in tech in Luxembourg.

title: Local Crafts Fair
shortDescription: Handmade crafts and souvenirs from local makers.
longDescription:
A small fair where visitors can buy handmade items and local souvenirs.
Nice for tourists looking for gifts and unique crafts.
Try visiting in the afternoon when most stalls are open.

title: New Year Countdown Concert
longDescription:
A festive concert to close the year, followed by a countdown celebration.
Perfect for visitors who want a special night activity in Luxembourg City.
Book early because New Year events often sell out quickly.
